triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, mill a card. Then if there are three or more creature cards in your graveyard, transform CARDNAME. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile a card from a graveyard. If a creature card was exiled this way, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.
